languages.text: "Простите, не признали. Уж думали, не дождемся. Доложу о вашем прибытии".

traits.locale_text: "Простите, не признали. Уж думали, не дождемся. Доложу о вашем прибытии".

languages.text: "Apologies, we didn't recognise you. We thought you weren't coming. I'll let them know you've arrived."
languages.original_text: "Простите, не признали. Уж думали, не дождемся. Доложу о вашем прибытии".

traits.locale_text: "Apologies, we didn't recognise you. We thought you weren't coming. I'll let them know you've arrived."
"Apologies, we didn't recognise you. We thought you weren't coming. I'll let them know you've arrived."
"Apologies, we didn't recognise you. We thought you weren't coming. I'll let them know you've arrived."

languages.text: “抱歉，刚才没认出您。我们还以为您不会来了。我这就前去通报。”
languages.original_text: "Apologies, we didn't recognise you. We thought you weren't coming. I'll let them know you've arrived."

traits.locale_text: “抱歉，刚才没认出您。我们还以为您不会来了。我这就前去通报。”

languages.text: « Mes excuses, nous ne vous avions pas {mf|reconnu|reconnue}. Nous pensions qu'il ne fallait plus vous attendre. Je vais les prévenir de votre arrivée. »
languages.original_text: "Apologies, we didn't recognise you. We thought you weren't coming. I'll let them know you've arrived."

traits.locale_text: « Mes excuses, nous ne vous avions pas {mf|reconnu|reconnue}. Nous pensions qu'il ne fallait plus vous attendre. Je vais les prévenir de votre arrivée. »

languages.text: "Özür dileriz, sizi tanıyamadık. Gelmeyeceğinizi düşünmüştük. Geldiğinizi onlara bildireceğim."
languages.original_text: "Apologies, we didn't recognise you. We thought you weren't coming. I'll let them know you've arrived."

traits.locale_text: "Özür dileriz, sizi tanıyamadık. Gelmeyeceğinizi düşünmüştük. Geldiğinizi onlara bildireceğim."

languages.text: «Lo lamento, no le habíamos reconocido. Pensábamos que no vendrían. Informaré de su llegada».
languages.original_text: "Apologies, we didn't recognise you. We thought you weren't coming. I'll let them know you've arrived."

traits.locale_text: «Lo lamento, no le habíamos reconocido. Pensábamos que no vendrían. Informaré de su llegada».

languages.text: "Entschuldig, dass wir Euch nicht erkannt haben. Wir dachten, Ihr würdet nicht kommen. Ich werde Eure Ankunft sofort melden."
languages.original_text: "Apologies, we didn't recognise you. We thought you weren't coming. I'll let them know you've arrived."

traits.locale_text: "Entschuldig, dass wir Euch nicht erkannt haben. Wir dachten, Ihr würdet nicht kommen. Ich werde Eure Ankunft sofort melden."

languages.text: 「すみません、気づきませんでした。来ないと思っていたので。到着したことを伝えますね。」
languages.original_text: "Apologies, we didn't recognise you. We thought you weren't coming. I'll let them know you've arrived."

traits.locale_text: 「すみません、気づきませんでした。来ないと思っていたので。到着したことを伝えますね。」
